ui.window.title: Audiogram
ui.tooltip.suppress_harmonics: Keep only the fundamental tones and suppress overtones.
ui.tooltip.sharpness: Fundamental detection sharpness: left keeps more points, right keeps only the brightest peaks.
ui.tooltip.speed: Playback speed (varispeed: changes both tempo and pitch).
ui.tooltip.loop: If disabled, the selected region plays once after Space/Play.
ui.tooltip.label_transpose: Transpose the note label under the cursor visually; the spectrogram stays unchanged.
ui.tooltip.audio_transpose: Pitch shift playback only. The spectrogram and note labels stay unchanged.
ui.tooltip.temperament: Temperament affects only note positions and labels; the spectrogram stays unchanged.
ui.tooltip.tonic_freq: Tonic frequency for just intonation (for example 440 Hz = A4, 435 Hz = old pitch).
ui.drop_hint: Drop an audio file here or click Open…
ui.status.speed_changed: Playback speed: {percent}% (pitch changes together with speed)
ui.spectrogram.zoom_hint: Click: cue cursor · Shift+Click: selection · two-finger scroll: pan · pinch: zoom · Cmd/Shift+scroll: zoom X/Y · right mouse: box zoom
